sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lungsim a pha mihing te aw
Topa tungah na lungdam un
Topa a teel mihing te aw
Dahna lung man’na pai san un

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Nuam un, Nuam un
Topa tungah na lungdam un
Nuam un, Nuam un
Topa tung ah lungdam khin un

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lungdam ve un Topa in-ah
Leitung, vantungah pha bel hi
A thupha a la phate tawh
Hong uk a ei-mah hong phel hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Topa aa ding galkap na-ah
Galte hong zo dek hang a ci
Topa galkap mangte in-ah
Galte sangin a tamzaw hi

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Sun lai in khua hong mial hangin
Zan lai van hong khup bang in-ah
Na lungsim na mawh lo ding hi
Um in gal bei mateng thupha
